name: Cheese Straws
recipeInstructions:
1. Place flour, ginger, and salt in a food processor.
2. Cut butter into small cubes and add to the processor; blend until the pastry resembles coarse meal.
3. Add finely shredded cheese and sesame seeds; process until just blended.
4. Mix Worcestershire Sauce with cold water, then sprinkle over the flour mixture. Process until the dough is moistened and holds together when pinched with fingers.
5. Gather the dough into a ball on a lightly floured surface and roll out to 1/8 inch thick.
6. Cut into strips that are 3 inches long and 1 1/2 inches wide.
7. Freeze the unbaked straws on baking sheets. Do not thaw before baking.
8. Bake on an ungreased sheet at 400 degrees until lightly browned and crisp. Makes 72 appetizers.
